title: Document All Breaking Changes with Migration Guide
description:
Research Reports R3-091 through R3-093 (Confidence 90%, High). Multiple breaking changes across API signatures, tool contracts, and planner logic. Migration guidance is partial in README and wiki. Tool signature migration guidance is incomplete.

Tasks:
1. Catalog ALL breaking changes with before/after code examples
2. Create per-tool migration paths
3. Expand migration section in README and wiki
4. Link to new deprecation policy (TSK-0130)

Source: research-MemorySmith.Agent Delta Audit Sprint-35, Council Addendum 2026-06-26
